title: Hello, world
excerpt: Why I built this site, and what I'll be writing about here.
body:
# Hello, world

This is the first post on my new site.

I built this whole thing to be **dynamic** — every post here was published straight from the [admin panel](/admin/) with a single click. No editing HTML, no redeploys by hand.

## What to expect

- notes on things I'm learning
- write-ups of side projects
- the occasional half-baked idea

Thanks for reading :)
